summary: Comprehensive testing of FinTres Pro user invitation system and Turkish character fixes completed. All 15 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for Turkish characters across all Settings tabs (Profil, Kullanıcılar, E-posta Ayarları, Hatırlatma Ayarları). User invite dialog has all required fields (name, email, phone, role, company selection). /set-password page renders correctly with FinTres Pro branding and shows proper error for invalid tokens.
passed_tests: Login with admin@fintrack.com / Admin123! - PASSED
POST /api/auth/invite creates pending user with invite_token - PASSED
Invited user appears in GET /api/users with pending status - PASSED
Login fails with 'pending' status user before password is set - PASSED
Duplicate invite correctly rejected (400) - PASSED
Non-admin cannot invite users (401/403) - PASSED
GET /api/auth/invite-info with invalid token returns 404 - PASSED
GET /api/auth/invite-info without token returns 422 - PASSED
GET /api/auth/invite-info with valid token returns name/email - PASSED
POST /api/auth/set-password with invalid token returns 404 - PASSED
POST /api/auth/set-password with short password rejected - PASSED
Full invitation flow (invite -> verify pending -> blocked login) - PASSED
Turkish characters in error messages preserved - PASSED
Turkish characters in user names preserved (Ömer Şahin Güneş) - PASSED
Activated test user can login (test@example.com / Test123!) - PASSED
Settings page tabs show Turkish chars: Kullanıcılar, E-posta Ayarları, Hatırlatma Ayarları - PASSED
User table headers: Ad Soyad, E-posta, Telefon, Rol, Durum, İşlem - PASSED
User invite dialog has: name, email, phone, role, company selection fields - PASSED
/set-password page renders with FinTres Pro branding - PASSED
/set-password page shows error for invalid token - PASSED
SMTP tab shows Turkish chars: Şifre, Gönderici, Ödeme - PASSED
Hatırlatma Ayarları tab shows Turkish chars: Hatırlatma, Ödeme, Türkiye, gün önce - PASSED
critical_code_review_comments: JWT secret key warning persists: 'The HMAC key is 23 bytes long, which is below the minimum recommended length of 32 bytes' - consider using a longer JWT_SECRET in production
updated_files: /app/backend/.env (fixed FRONTEND_URL formatting - was concatenated with CORS_ORIGINS)
seed_data_creation: Test users created during testing were cleaned up. Existing users: Admin User, Test Kullanıcı, Demo User (pending), Test Invited User (pending)
context_for_next_testing_agent: FinTres Pro user invitation system fully functional. Turkish characters (ö, ü, ş, ç, ğ, ı, İ) display correctly across all pages. User invitation flow: Admin invites -> User gets email with token -> User visits /set-password?token=X -> User creates password -> User can login. SMTP email sending uses fake credentials so actual emails won't send but endpoints work. All 4 Settings tabs working correctly.
